channel.title: U.S. Police Shooting News Tracker
channel.description: Automated news aggregation tracking police-involved shootings in the United States

item.title: Records show ICE agent fatally shot U.S. citizen nearly a year ago in Texas
item.description: Ruben Ray Martinez was fatally shot in South Padre Island, Texas, in March 2025. ICE's involvement in the shooting was not disclosed until more than 11 months after the shooting.

item.title: DHS agent fatally shot and killed US citizen who hit officer with car in March 2025: records
item.description: Ruben Ray Martinez, 23, was killed by agents with the Department of Homeland Security, attorneys for Martinez's family said in a statement.

item.title: Father of Arab Israeli fatally shot by police disputes officer's threat claim
item.description: Witnesses to the shooting of Ahmed Ashkar during a police chase said Israel Police used unnecessary force, shooting Ashkar even after he had already fallen from his motorcycle. 'He didn't endanger anyone,' his father said

item.title: US citizen shot and killed by federal immigration agent last year, new records show - The Guardian
item.description: US citizen shot and killed by federal immigration agent last year, new records showThe Guardian Ruben Ray Martinez Was Killed in an Undisclosed ICE Shooting in March, His Family SaysThe New York Times Texan shot dead by ICE agent months before killings in Min…

item.title: Prosecution shuts down police probe of MK over on-air 'zero' slur
item.description: The move follows a heated TV exchange about a fatal police shooting, in which the lawmaker told a uniformed spokesperson to 'shut your mouth' and called him 'a nobody.' Police issued a rare public rebuke, accused him of abusing parliamentary immunity, and dem…

item.title: Ruben Ray Martinez Was Killed in an Undisclosed ICE Shooting in March, His Family Says - The New York Times
item.description: Ruben Ray Martinez Was Killed in an Undisclosed ICE Shooting in March, His Family SaysThe New York Times US citizen shot and killed by federal immigration agent last year, new records showThe Guardian Texas man was fatally shot by a federal immigration agent …

item.title: Man Fatally Shot Last Year Now Revealed to Have Been Killed by ICE
item.description: According to reporting published Friday by The New York Times, 23-year-old U.S. citizen Ruben Ray Martinez was fatally shot by ICE agents in South Texas in March 2025 after allegedly failing to follow commands to exit his vehicle. The post Man Fatally Shot La…

item.title: 'Homeland' Confirms ICE Agent Fatally Shot US Citizen...
item.description: Ruben Ray Martinez was shot through his driver's-side window in South Padre Island, Texas.

item.title: Tel Aviv nightclub stabbing raises Israel's 2026 homicide toll to 56
item.description: Police said they arrested a person of interest in the suspected murder, which they said took part during a brawl near a club in central Tel Aviv. On Wednesday, three men were shot and killed in two different homicides and police fatally shot a motorcyclist wh…

item.title: Family of First Nation man killed in police shooting learned of SIU ruling online
item.description: Nishnawbe Aski Nation (NAN) says the way Ontario's Special Investigations Unit has handled recent cases involving NAN members is 'unacceptable,' including how the family of Tyresse Roundsky says they weren’t notified that the investigation into his death had …

item.title: After police shootings, Mamdani faces new pressure to overhaul NYC’s mental health crisis response
item.description: Two 911 calls for help ended with police at the door. Experts say dispatch rules and limited B-HEARD coverage leave few non-police options.

item.title: SWAT units shoot man barricaded in Lower Burrell home, accused of shooting at officers
item.description: Westmoreland County detectives are investigating an officer-involved shooting in Lower Burrell on Saturday.

item.title: Cops Fatally Shoot Man With Knife at Arc de Triomphe
item.description: A man wielding a knife and scissors was fatally shot by police in Paris on Friday when he tried to attack an officer during a ceremony at the city's Arc de Triomphe monument, officials said. The suspect, a French national born in 1978 who'd previously been co…

item.title: Feds Open Perjury Probe After ICE Officer Shot Venezuelan
item.description: Federal authorities have opened a criminal probe into whether two immigration officers lied under oath about a shooting in Minneapolis last month, as all charges were dropped against two Venezuelan men. Immigration and Customs Enforcement Director Todd Lyons …

item.title: Terror convict, recently released, shot dead by Paris police after alleged knife attack near Arc de Triomphe
item.description: Police shot a man who allegedly tried to attack an officer with a knife in Paris. The suspect was recently released from prison after serving a terrorism-related sentence.

item.title: Man shot dead after attacking police near Arc de Triomphe in Paris
item.description: A man who tried to attack a police ‌officer with a knife near the Arc de Triomphe in Paris on Friday ‌was shot by police and ⁠later died of his ⁠injuries, France's ⁠anti-terrorism prosecution office said. The police ‌officer was not harmed and no one ⁠else ⁠w…

item.title: A powerful tool of resistance is already in your hands
item.description: In an eyewitness video analyzed frame by frame by The New York Times, Alex Pretti raises one hand and holds a phone in the other. Federal agents tackle him, and one appears to find and remove a gun holstered on his hip. Then, an agent shoots - and a second fo…

item.title: Paris: Knife-wielding man shot by police at Arc de Triomphe
item.description: A man was shot and injured after attacking police during a ceremonial lighting of an eternal flame under the Paris landmark.

item.title: DOJ Drops Charges Against Two Minneapolis Men It Accused of Attacking ICE Agents
item.description: The federal government has shifted its view on the January 14 incident, when an agent shot one of the men.

item.title: Prosecutor Seeks Dismissal of Charges Against Man Shot by ICE - The New York Times
item.description: Prosecutor Seeks Dismissal of Charges Against Man Shot by ICEThe New York Times Justice department moves to drop charges against men accused of hitting ICE officer in MinnesotaThe Guardian Government moves to dismiss charges against men in ICE-involved shooti…

item.title: Officer-involved shooting under investigation in Seattle’s Ballard neighborhood
item.description: Seattle police are investigating an officer-involved shooting in the Ballard neighborhood Thursday evening.

item.title: Lawyers of Chicago woman shot by federal agents say documents show how DHS lies about investigations
item.description: Marimar Martinez, a teaching assistant and U.S. citizen, was shot five times by a Border Patrol agent in October while in her vehicle. She was charged with a felony after Homeland Security officials accused her of trying to ram agents with her vehicle. But th…

item.title: ICE accuses Honduran alien of ramming law enforcement vehicle before agent shoots out tires
item.description: Dramatic video shows ICE agent drawing gun after Honduran illegal alien allegedly rammed a law enforcement vehicle during an arrest attempt in New Jersey.

item.title: Lawyers of Chicago woman shot by federal agents say documents show how DHS lies about investigations - AP News
item.description: Lawyers of Chicago woman shot by federal agents say documents show how DHS lies about investigationsAP News Border patrol chief praised federal agent who shot US citizen in ChicagoThe Guardian Body camera footage and texts reveal details of Border Patrol agen…

item.title: A sword in the van driven by the 17-year-old Jaffna student who was shot dead after driving ignoring orders.
item.description: A 17-year-old youth has died after police opened fire on a suspicious van that failed to stop when ordered by police in the Allapiddy area of the Kayts Police Division in Jaffna yesterday (10) morning. <!--gossip-below-article-Rs--> (adsbygoogle = window.ads…

item.title: 1 sent to hospital following officer-involved shooting in Hickory
item.description: Officers are on leave and a suspect is in the hospital after a shooting outside a church.
